description: Processes case attachments (images, PDFs, documents) to extract error codes and relevant information. Uses GPT-4 Vision for image analysis. Part of the Carrier Case Triage Agent Swarm.
use_case: MVP Use Case 1 - Customer Service Case Triage

demo_scenarios.name: Process All Attachments
demo_scenarios.description: Analyze all attachments for a case

key_findings: E47 error code displayed on unit control panel
Previous service record shows refrigerant leak repair in 2023

demo_scenarios.name: Extract Image Info
demo_scenarios.description: Use GPT-4 Vision to analyze an equipment image

demo_scenarios.name: Analyze Error Codes
demo_scenarios.description: Look up Carrier error codes and provide context

codes_analyzed.probable_cause: Overcharged system, TXV stuck open, or sensing bulb issue

codes_analyzed.recommended_action: Inspect and replace sensor if needed

demo_scenarios.name: Summarize Attachments
demo_scenarios.description: Create a brief summary of all attachment findings

expected_output.summary: Customer provided photo showing E47 error code on RTU display. Installation manual also attached for reference.
action_items: Verify E47 troubleshooting steps from manual

error_code_database.E47: Low Superheat - Check TXV and refrigerant charge
error_code_database.E48: High Superheat - Low refrigerant or restriction
